stories.title: Canes strike back in an instant classic Game 2: Gr...
stories.summary: The series is tied 1-1, heading to Vegas for Game 3. Here's what it all means, with a look ahead to what's next.

stories.title: Canes even Stanley Cup Final on Jarvis' OT goal
stories.summary: Seth Jarvis scored on the power play in overtime after Carolina erased a deficit in regulation only to give up a late tying goal, and the Hurricanes beat Vegas 4-3 in Game 2 of the Stanley Cup Final on Thursday night to even the series.

stories.title: Yankees star Judge out with stress fracture in rib...
stories.summary: Yankees outfielder Aaron Judge has been diagnosed with a stress fracture of the first rib on his right side, the team announced Thursday night.

stories.title: Vegas undaunted but objects to disallowed goal
stories.summary: The Golden Knights said they remain confident despite the Hurricanes' stunning rally to win Game 2 of the Stanley Cup Final, which was fueled by a critical failed coach's challenge in the third period.

stories.title: Texas claims second straight WCWS title over TTU
stories.summary: Kayden Henry homered to lead Texas to a 4-1 victory over Texas Tech on Thursday night at the Women's College World Series for a second straight national championship.
